rationale.R1.2: The agent identified a critical contradiction and provided thorough reconstructions, demonstrating end-to-end logical analysis.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed but could be more explicit across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content; identified potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Lacked detailed traceability for each change or reasoning step.
